body_excerpt: In multiple functions  of io_uring.c, there is a possible kernel memory corruption due to improper locking. This could lead to local escalation of privilege in the kernel with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
